markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review AI performance and align on a more targeted content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI visibility is up:** Prophecy now appears in 7 of 9 tracked prompts, including a 28% visibility on "best low-code alternatives," where it outranks Alteryx.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**New strategy → hyper-specific content:** The focus shifts to long-tail topics (e.g., "Alteryx + Databricks") to target users with an active, defined problem, increasing the likelihood of citation.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**Web dev bottleneck removed:** A new process using ChatGPT for HTML generation makes adding comparison tables to Webflow articles a fast, low-effort task.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [**Raj's feedback is pending:** Awaiting review of the content map and prompt list, expected next week after a travel-related delay.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

## Topics

### AI Performance Review

  - [AI visibility has improved over the last 7 days.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Visibility:** Prophecy now appears in 7 of 9 tracked prompts (up from \~0).](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Top Prompt:** "best low-code alternatives" → 28% visibility, outranking Alteryx.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Citation Rate:** Remains low; Prophecy is mentioned but not cited.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [**Long-Tail vs. Broad Search:**](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [**Broad:** "alternatives to Alteryx" → low visibility due to 56+ competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [**Long-Tail:** "Alteryx for large data sets" → high visibility, appearing in \>50% of results.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

### New Content Strategy: Hyper-Specific Topics

  - [**Goal:** Increase citation rate by targeting users with an active, defined problem.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Sales feedback confirms the Alteryx takeout works best for users already on Databricks or Snowflake.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [**Initial Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [**Databricks Users:** Content on productivity, workflow automation, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [**Snowflake Users:** Content for analysts and analytics engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**De-prioritized:** BigQuery-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)

### Production Process Improvements

  - [**Comparison Tables:**](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [**Problem:** Adding HTML tables to Webflow was a slow, difficult bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use ChatGPT to generate unstyled HTML from a table screenshot.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Cody can now add tables quickly. The web dev will build a template script to auto-style them, making the process nearly instant.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Account Management

  - [**Contract:** The 6-month extension runs through May.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [**Renewal:** A quarterly review will be scheduled closer to the renewal date.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [**Context:** Cody noted Raj's hands-on style and the value of GrowthX's external perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
      - [Review and approve new content ideas in Airtable, prioritizing hyper-specific topics.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
      - [Add detailed context to new ideas to guide the production team.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
      - [Ping Raj next week for feedback on the content map and prompt list.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [Brief the production team on the new hyper-specific content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [Create custom Airtable views for Cody if requested.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
      - [Ping Raj for feedback on the content map and prompt list.](https://fathom.video/share/zdW8QfAZxs1Ez6NDWAHiZsz7oRqWPWev?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
